look for bad syslog entries

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
7a8,16
> Nov 28 20:05:51 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1069857]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:05:51 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1069857]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:05:51 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1069857]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:22:36 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1344917]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:22:36 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1344917]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:22:36 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1344917]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:30:27 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1444245]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:30:27 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1444245]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:30:27 ae30d279ef24 pmie[1444245]:     # /bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
17a27
> Nov 28 19:18:52 ae30d279ef24 pmlogger[500157]: /usr/lib/pcp/bin/pmsignal: 125: kill: No such process
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
